description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.6-alpine3.6 Docker image and define two stages: test and deploy, with PYPI_USER and PYPI_PASSWORD variables. In the test stage add a python36 job that runs pip --no-cache-dir install tox, export SETUPTOOLS_SCM_PRETEND_VERSION=0.0.1, set TOX_ENV=$(tox -l | grep "${TOX_PY}-" | tr '\n' ','), and execute tox -e $TOX_ENV. Also in the test stage add a flake8 job that runs pip --no-cache-dir install flake8 and then flake8. In the deploy stage add a deploy_pypi job that runs only on tags matching the regex /^v\d+\.\d+\.\d+([abc]\d*)?$/ and not on branches, installs git with apk --no-cache add git, writes a ~/.pypirc file containing the PYPI_USER and PYPI_PASSWORD credentials, and uploads the package using python setup.py check sdist bdist_wheel upload.
